CustomField.formula: Account.Name&" is "& RelatedAccount.Name &"'s "& IF(IsActive,"","former ")&Lower(PartyRoleRelation.RoleName)&"."& BR() & BR() & RelatedAccount.Name&" is "&Account.Name &"'s "& IF(IsActive,"","former ")& Lower(PartyRoleRelation.RelatedRoleName)&"."
CustomField.label: Explanation
